title: gonolobus marginatus
intro: Gonolobus marginatus, also known as the Coral Hibiscus or the Coral Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonolobus marginatus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, while also promoting skin and hair health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
